business_name: Paws with Claws Pet Spa & Resort
greeting: Welcome to Paws with Claws Pet Spa & Resort! I'm the virtual receptionist. How can I help your pet today?

faq.a: We're open daily from 7AM to 9PM — seven days a week!
Yes! We offer both cat and dog grooming and boarding services.

faq.q: Do you need appointments for grooming?
faq.a: Yes, we recommend calling (480) 791-4197 to schedule your pet's grooming appointment.
Our daycare lets dogs play freely in a safe, supervised environment instead of being in cages or kennels.
We're in Ahwatukee, Arizona. Call us for the exact address and directions.
Yes! We offer cage-free grooming options for pets who prefer a more comfortable environment.

faq.q: Can I board my dog long-term?
faq.a: Absolutely! We offer both short-term and extended boarding options.

escalation: Great question! Let me have a team member get back to you. Call us directly at (480) 791-4197.
